parameters.name: versionID
parameters.description: Voiceflow project version ID. You can also use `'development'` to identify the version on canvas or `'production'` to identify the published version. However if using an alias this must be used in conjuction with the `projectid` header.

parameters.name: projectid
parameters.description: Voiceflow project ID. This is meant to be used in conjunction with a versionID alias on the path.

get.description:
Retrieve your Voiceflow project files. It will either be a:
  - `.vf` file which contains all the information of a project including details about blocks and steps in the diagrams.
  - `.vfr` file which includes a more concise version of the project in the `programs` property. We recommend to use this file for any programmatic analysis or integrating with third-party tooling.

In order to reliably use the `.vfr` file's `programs` property, we recommend selecting the "Publish" or "Run" button from the canvas after any updates to the project to ensure it is reflected in the file.
Check if there are unread transcripts for the given project

200.description: true if there are unreads, false otherwise

put.description:
Creates a transcript recording the conversation between the user with `userID` and your Voiceflow assistant corresponding to the version with `versionID`.


A transcript includes three fields: `os`, `browser`, `device`, which accept any string value. You can use these properties to record additional metadata about the conversations.
Marks a "no match" intent as being fixed by signaling that a new utterance has been aded to the given intent

turnID.description: the turn ID which we want to add the utterance to

intentID.description: the intent ID which we want to add the utterance to

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: the number of turns to return, use offset to fetch more

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: the number of turns to skip before returning

parameters.name: range
parameters.description: filter transcripts dialog by end date

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: filter transcripts dialog by start date

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: filter transcripts dialog by end date

get.description: Get the transcript dialogs for the given projectID/transcriptID. This holds all the traces of the conversation that have been generated. The `limit` and `offset` parameters can be used to paginate the results.

patch.description: update a transcipt record for the given projectID/transcriptID

delete.description: delete a transcipt record with the given projectID/transcriptID

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: the output forma, currently only csv

get.description: Get the transcript dialogs in a CSV format

parameters.name: range
parameters.description: filter transcripts dialog by end date

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: filter transcripts dialog by start date

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: filter transcripts dialog by end date

delete.description: Remove a tag associated to a transcript

put.description: Add a tag to a transcript

APIKey.name: Authorization
APIKey.description: All requests made to the Project API must be validated with the project DM API Key.

projectID.description: the project ID that the transcript belongs to

sessionID.description: The ID of the conversation session to record as a transcript. This should be the same value as the `userID` property of the Dialog API.

browser.description: the browser that was used when for the interaction

device.description: the device that was used when for the interaction

os.description: the operating system that was used when for the interaction

reportTags.description: the tags associated with the transcript

unread.description: true if the transcrip is unread, false otherwise

utteranceAddedCount.description: the number of uterrances added to the intent

utteranceAddedTo.description: the id of the intent the utterance was added to

creatorID.description: the ID of the user who created the transcript

createdAt.description: the date time the transcript was created

updatedAt.description: the date time the transcript was updated

name.description: the name of the user who created the transcript

image.description: the voiceflow image of the user who created the transcript

turnID.description: the ID for the turn on a given dialog

format.description: the format of the turn. Launch/request for dialog start, trace for other interactions.

type.description: the concrete type of this turn, if format is trace this is the trace type, otherwise shows the turn format

payload.description: this holds the actual trace payload sent during the turn

startTime.description: the time the interaction was generated
